schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
schemes.benefit: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each to all landholding farmer families.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
schemes.benefit: Health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization in empanelled hospitals.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.benefit: A small deposit scheme for the girl child with high interest rates and tax benefits under Section 80C.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
schemes.benefit: Financial assistance and interest subsidy on home loans for building or purchasing a house in urban areas.

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
schemes.benefit: Guarantees at least 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
schemes.benefit: Support for traditional artisans including skill training, toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, and collateral-free credit support.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
schemes.benefit: Maternity benefit of ₹5,000 for the first living child of the family, paid in three installments.

schemes.name: PM-YASASVI Entrance Test for Scholarships
schemes.benefit: Scholarships for students in Class 9 and Class 11 to study in top identified schools.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
schemes.benefit: Loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises without collateral.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after the age of 60 years.

schemes.name: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
schemes.benefit: Subsidies for installing rooftop solar panels to provide up to 300 units of free electricity every month.

schemes.name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
schemes.benefit: Financial assistance to students belonging to Scheduled Castes for pursuing post-matriculation courses.

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free working capital loan of up to ₹50,000 to street vendors to resume their livelihoods.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
schemes.benefit: Universal access to banking facilities with a basic savings account, RuPay debit card, and ₹2 lakh accident insurance cover.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.benefit: Comprehensive crop insurance against non-preventable natural risks at a very low premium for farmers.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Account
schemes.benefit: High-interest savings account for the girl child to build a corpus for her education and marriage.

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.benefit: Ensures survival, protection, and education of the girl child through coordinated and convergent efforts.

schemes.name: Kanyashree Prakalpa (West Bengal)
schemes.benefit: Annual scholarship and a one-time grant to incentivize girls to continue their education and delay marriage.

schemes.name: Stand Up India Scheme
schemes.benefit: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch.

schemes.name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
schemes.benefit: Skill certification scheme to enable Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training for better livelihoods.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bhav Mission
schemes.benefit: A saturation approach to ensure all health schemes reach every intended beneficiary across the country.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
schemes.benefit: Accidental insurance scheme offering a cover of ₹2 lakh for accidental death and full disability.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.benefit: Life insurance scheme offering a cover of ₹2 lakh for death due to any reason at a low premium.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
schemes.benefit: Provides free LPG connections to women from below-poverty-line (BPL) households.

schemes.name: National Digital Health Mission (NDHM)
schemes.benefit: Creation of digital health IDs for all citizens to maintain seamless electronic health records.

schemes.name: Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY)
schemes.benefit: Highly subsidized food grains (rice at ₹3/kg and wheat at ₹2/kg) for the poorest of the poor families.

schemes.name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana
schemes.benefit: Pension scheme for senior citizens offering an assured rate of return of 7.4% per annum.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
schemes.benefit: Provides timely credit to farmers for their cultivation and other needs such as purchase of seeds, fertilizers, and pesticides.

schemes.name: Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students
schemes.benefit: Scholarship of ₹50,000 per annum to meritorious girl students pursuing technical education.

schemes.name: Agnipath Scheme
schemes.benefit: Allows patriotic youth to serve in the Indian Armed Forces for a period of four years as Agniveers.
